extraction.one_line_summary: VERONA Carlos won from a breakaway at Vaujany, holding off ROGLIČ Primož's late attack by 17 seconds as ROGLIČ took yellow.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ Primož attacked with 1.5km remaining on Vaujany, used VINGEGAARD Jonas as pace-setter beforehand, prioritized time over stage win.
DONOVAN Mark caught after solo bridge attempt when DSM drastically increased pace with multiple riders, showing team depth strategy.
ELISSONDE Kenny attacked immediately after appearing dropped, revealing feigned weakness as tactical deception before solo move.
VERONA Carlos from breakaway survived final kilometer despite knowing ROGLIČ approached, suggesting leaders hesitated too long on final climb gradient.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: attacked with 1.5km to go after VINGEGAARD pacing, answered knee injury questions with dominant acceleration, took yellow jersey
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: finished third after setting prolonged pace for ROGLIČ on final climb, demonstrated domestique strength and recovery
rider_signals.VERONA Carlos: positive: first World Tour win at 29, survived solo on final kilometer despite chase, won most aggressive rider award
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: finished fourth, stayed with ROGLIČ group despite sustained pressure on final climb
rider_signals.ELISSONDE Kenny: positive: attacked after appearing dropped, showed tactical deception and pure climbing strength
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: negative: lost 48 seconds to winner, grimacing heavily on final climb, significantly distanced from GC contenders
rider_signals.GAUDU David: negative: grimacing with effort, lost 48 seconds alongside GEOGHEGAN HART, unable to match GC group pace
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: negative: pedaling squares at finish, significant time loss indicates stage race fatigue or poor climbing form
